stemHtml: What is the purpose of the re-breather bag on a passenger oxygen mask?

options.a: To change exhaled CO2 back into Oxygen for breathing.
options.b: For mixing exhaled air with fresh oxygen.
options.c: To allow the mask to filter and purify the air before inhalation.
options.d: To even out pressure fluctuations and act as a reserve if the pressure gets low.
